infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HKCampus accesses your photo library so you can choose images for your avatar, posts, messages, food reviews, and schedule import.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HKCampus accesses the camera so you can take and send photos in messages.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HKCampus accesses your location only when you choose location-based campus features such as centering the map or attaching a location to a post.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: HKCampus uses Face ID to help you sign in securely on this device.

plugins.photosPermission: HKCampus accesses your photo library so you can choose images for your avatar, posts, messages, food reviews, and schedule import.
plugins.cameraPermission: HKCampus accesses the camera so you can take and send photos in messages.

plugins.faceIDPermission: HKCampus uses Face ID to help you sign in securely on this device.
